title: clerodendrum neriifolium
intro: Clerodendrum neriifolium, also known as the glory bower, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum neriifolium include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as the common cold and flu. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
